title: Pride Fishing Line
description: Mod to make the fishing line pride coloured 🏳️‍🌈
body:
![Gay](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/74aTv108/images/071b0da4b0956d18fe61c0d1c37f3a92dc3a3f0a.webp)

Mod fork based on [Colored Fishing Lines](https://modrinth.com/mod/dyeable-fishing-lines) but modified to be customisable using [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)
